race.comment: MISTER TUDOR (11) was prominent on the corner over 800m at Ipswich, beaten a long neck. Perfectly placed and just has to run up to that to be tough to beat. RAIDERLICIOUS (4) finished second at Warwick two runs back but didn't measure up last time over 1000m at Gold Coast, beaten 3.5 lengths. Has a wide gate to contend with, but is better suited today and gets in well with the 4kg claim. Will be right in the finish with average luck. WORTHY (8) resumed improved for the new yard, delivering her Maiden over 800m at Ipswich. Has been kept on the fresh side and has more to give. Will use the low barrier and will give a big sight. GYPSY TRICKS (1) was just nudged out over 800m at Warwick first-up, in stronger. The gate is sticky, but the 2kg claim is handy. Strips fitter and will be around the mark.
